Platemail Helm hard to find?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2016 at 8:58 AM Rating: Decent
lizarinn
View User Forum
15 posts
Gnome tinkerers may want to turn off the "show only items you can use" flag. Caught me out badly :-).
▲ Page top
not in POK
QuoteReply
# May 08 2016 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
scuba
Scholar
110 posts
None of the vendors listed for POK have the helm.
▲ Page top
platemail helm vendor
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2015 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
smokingruffy
9 posts
Simple factual post is all we ask of everyone please. Sold in Crescent Reach zone on the second floor of smithing area. Vendor is Merchant Baruti located on the right side of the entrance. Loc is Neg 1149.47,,,NEG 1548.45 . Hope this saves somone some time.
▲ Page top
vendors
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2010 at 7:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592782893379
7 posts
If you go to eqtraders.com and input platemail helm in search window you will get a list of platemail helms. Click on this one and it gives a list ove vendors that sell this all over Norrath. I got mine in akanon. there sold all over but not in POK.





~Remember who you are~
▲ Page top
vender

# Jan 27 2010 at 7:02 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591823749055
6 posts
Found on Vender - Merchant Irontree in Felwithe in the armor building next to the bank

platemail helm
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2006 at 4:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1598199352742
106 posts
This cost me 368pp and I bought it in Kelethin off of Merchant Tananie. Lanhern Firepride in S.Qeynos does not sell this item and she is not a vendor anymore as she did not sell anything at all.
▲ Page top
WHY???
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2001 at 9:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764113877
3 posts
Why is plate 500pp and a bronze helm with the same ac is 15pp???
▲ Page top
RE: WHY???
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2002 at 12:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247904331
View User Forum
Scholar
34 posts
If you look at the person who listed you will see it is Allakhazam, the guy who runs the site. The price listed is the price if you buy from a merchant. Prices will run closer to 400pp if you are a gnome with OK charisma and faction.

I have been told if you get a High Elf Enchanter friend to get it for you can get around 200pp. However, they will need to have their charisma very high and their faction good.

Only people using trade skill will buy most armor from the merchant. This for example is used in making the Rebreather.
▲ Page top
